top_signals.title: Former Governors Teams Up to Address AI Job Losses
top_signals.summary: Former Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb (R) says he is co-chairing an organization called RAISE US that is aimed at easing the American workforce’s transition to an artificial intelligence-based economy. Speaking to Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec on Bloomberg Businessweek, Holcomb explains that gaining support from big tech and leading AI companies like Amazon, Anthropic and Microsoft shows that shared commitment to preparing workers for AI-driven jobs.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Defense Industrial Alliance Washington Is Throwing Away
top_signals.summary:
As the relationship between the United States and Canada continues to degrade, it now comes at the expense of each country’s industrial security.Last month, the Pentagon announced the unilateral suspension of the 86-year-old Canadian Permanent Joint Board on Defense in response to what the White House sees as Ottawa’s failure to present a credible plan to spend 3.5 percent of GDP on defense by 2035. And the opening of the gleaming new bridge between Detroit and Windsor has been long delayed in the tense run-up to the continental trade deal review.What many policymakers in Washington fail to realize is that

The post The Defense Industrial Alliance Washington Is Throwing Away appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Get Tech Boost After AI-Fueled Selloff: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rally in several technology giants lifted stocks as the recent artificial-intelligence selloff lured buyers betting the industry’s investment boom will continue to support solid corporate earnings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Senate leaders push for July passage of CLARITY Act
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers in the US Senate are on state work periods until July 13, giving them only four weeks to address a cryptocurrency market structure bill before another break and possible delays due to campaigning for elections.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SEC wraps up NanoBit crypto fraud case in final judgment, ordering over $5 million in fines
top_signals.summary: The SEC resolved its case against NanoBit after alleging the crypto platform lied to investors and stole their money.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
